project.name: Bun Workflow Test Monorepo
project.summary: Tooling fixture that verifies the shared Bun release workflow against a small workspace-package monorepo.
goals: Provide a real Bun workspace monorepo for validating shared release workflow behavior.
Exercise workspace protocol dependency resolution between @sylphx/workflow-test-core and @sylphx/workflow-test-utils.
Publish test packages through the shared Sylphx release workflow when release changes are present.
nonGoals: Own a production application or customer-facing SDK.
Own the shared release workflow implementation.
Own enterprise engineering doctrine, standards, or project manifest schema.

owns.name: bun-release-workflow-fixture
owns.description: Small Bun workspace monorepo used to verify release workflow behavior and workspace dependency publishing.

doesNotOwn: Shared release workflow implementation owned by SylphxAI/.github.
Production application behavior or customer-facing product SDKs.
Enterprise doctrine and manifest schema owned by SylphxAI/doctrine.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema and engineering doctrine

forbiddenCouplings: Do not treat this fixture as a product SDK or customer runtime.
Do not change shared release workflow semantics here; update SylphxAI/.github and verify through this fixture.
Do not fork doctrine standards into this repository.

delivery.deployPath: Pushes to main run .github/workflows/release.yml, which calls the SylphxAI/.github reusable release workflow and publishes test packages when release changes are present.
delivery.productionProof: Successful GitHub Release workflow on main plus npm package readback for @sylphx/workflow-test-core and @sylphx/workflow-test-utils when a publish occurs.

gaps.description: Main has a release workflow caller but no required PR admission or postsubmit proof contexts; keep this explicit until ADR-29 admission is adopted or intentionally exempted for the fixture.
gaps.target: central ADR-29 required-context rollout or documented fixture exemption

gaps.description: No runbook explains how to interpret fixture release runs or npm readback after shared workflow changes.
gaps.target: before the next shared release workflow contract change.
